title: tingulonga crassifolia
intro: Tingulonga crassifolia, also known as Strychnos crassifolia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tingulonga crassifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, the seeds are crushed and mixed with water to create a herbal remedy.
